title: ChestFinder
description: ChestFinder is a plugin for Minecraft (Spigot/Paper) that helps players find chests within a 10-block radius.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f87b5453ba982f69a1808a345a6aea69dcdd8d.jpeg)
# ChestFinder - Chest Finding Plugin for Minecraft
ChestFinder is a plugin for Minecraft (Spigot/Paper) that helps players find chests within a 10-block radius. The plugin triggers sound and visual effects when approaching a chest and allows administrators to grant or revoke access to the chest search feature.
# 📜 Features
🔍 Chest Search: Players can activate chest search for 5 minutes.

🎁 Special Chest Search Only: The plugin only considers chests found in temples, abandoned mines, dungeons, fortresses, and sunken ships.

⏳ Limited Usage Time: Access is valid for 3 days, but players can use the search only once.

⏳ Disabling Auto-Grant: You can disable auto-grant when joining the server and assign permissions manually.

🎇 Sound and Visual Effects: Upon detecting a chest, players hear the chest-opening sound and see a lightning particle.

⚙ Admin Commands: Flexible permission management through commands.
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47fad5d307a9eef203324f21b1555c1c235c9747.jpeg)

# 📦 Installation
1. Download ChestFinder.jar.
2. Place it in your server's plugins folder.
3. Restart the server.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bedf961c0dd50c12cdb203a60058e1af930e4fb.jpeg)
# ⌨ Commands
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad79aeed5e5635a16e22712c3e0027132bebbdb9.png)
# 🔔 Access Reminder
When a player enters the game, if they have active access but haven’t used it, they will receive a message with the remaining time.
# 📌 Example of Operation
1. A player logs in and receives permission to search for chests for 3 days.
2. They activate /findchests and have 5 minutes to search.
3. When approaching a chest, they hear the chest-opening sound and see lightning.
4. If the player hasn’t used /findchests, they will receive a reminder about their access on their next login.

# ⚠ Important
- Players can use /findchests only once during the permission period.
- Only chests in specified structures are considered (not regular chests).
Enjoy the game! 🎮

## Let me know if you need any adjustments!
**Disclaimer: These images are illustrative and do not represent actual in-game graphics. The final appearance may vary based on Minecraft's visual style and server settings.**
